summary: Frontend-only testing of 6 new Home sections + expanded Service detail page for Coreon IT. All new sections render correctly with proper data-testids. 37/37 functional checks passed (initial price-badge 'fail' was a test-script casing issue — GR uses CSS text-transform:uppercase so 'από' renders as 'ΑΠΌ'; re-verified both GR & EN price badges render on all 6 service cards).

verified_checks.lang_toggle: Works — Industries h2 changes from Greek to English
verified_checks.navigation: All items present: Home, About, Services, Pricing, Portfolio, Blog, FAQ, Contact

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: FaqPreview slices first 4 items from t('faqPage.items'); fine as long as translations always contain >=4 items — ok today.
Minor: tech badge testid slug uses [^a-z0-9]→'-'; works but could produce duplicate testids if two techs normalize to the same string (none today).
Consistency: Home.jsx 'Learn more' on service cards is hard-coded English; other sections use translated 'Περισσότερα'/'Learn more'. Minor i18n gap (pre-existing, not introduced in this iteration).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home renders 6 new sections in order: TrustBar, Industries, Process (after Services), Comparison, TechStack, FaqPreview. Service detail (/services/<slug>) has Deliverables(5), Tech badges, Testimonial block, Related Services(3 excluding current slug), and service-detail-cta. Lang toggle buttons are 'ΕΛ'/'EN' in header (no dedicated testid). Brand is 'Coreon IT' as expected.
